title: gregoria montana
intro: Gregoria montana, also known as the Andaman tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Sapindaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Gregoria montana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
